## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between RunPod and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and content creation progress.](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on two main content clusters: "Rent GPU Name" and "Bare Metal Comparisons"](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Improve content quality to outrank competitors like HyperStack, despite their strong SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Implement attribution tracking to better understand user acquisition channels](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Leverage Reddit for increased visibility and mentions in Google AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy Refinement

  - [Narrowed down broad ideas to focus on high-converting content](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Main traffic sources: direct homepage visits (50-66%) and paid ads](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - ["Rent GPU Name" pages convert \~2x better than other SEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Prioritizing content clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
    1.  Rent GPU Name (50-100 potential pages)
    2.  Bare Metal comparisons
  - [Additional ideas: GPU A vs B, Cloud A vs B vs RunPod comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Aim to outrank competitors like HyperStack by creating more comprehensive content](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Include specific sections: card details, benefits, technical specs, and targeted Q\&As](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX's efficient content creation process for quick deployment of new pages](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Attribution and User Acquisition

  - [Need to implement better attribution tracking (e.g., surveys, "How did you hear about us?")](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Consider piloting Reddit engagement strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Semi-automated system to surface relevant threads and prepare responses](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Previous manual Reddit engagement increased mentions in Google AI overviews from 25% to 78%](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Sydney shared two articles for review: "Bare metal versus traditional VMs" and "How to Use RunPod Instant Clusters for Real-Time Inference"](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [RunPod team to provide feedback, focusing on accuracy and step-by-step instructions](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Use title case for article headlines](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [RunPod's main sitemap is now working; blog sitemap still needs fixing](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [GrowthX can now use AI workflow for internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide a list of topics for the two prioritized content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [RunPod to review and approve topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [RunPod team to provide feedback on shared articles by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver 5 more articles by end of week/early next week](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Implement temporary content publishing process until Webflow is set up (ETA: end of month)](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a template for the GPU content pages](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [RunPod to investigate current attribution tracking methods](https://fathom.video/share/14Pp-YQvfk-wSntMoKYfrG2NtfMHpecT?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
